title: Any news of Eva 10 appearing in New York City Philly
display_title: Any news of Eva 10 appearing in New York City Philly
wikitext:
[]: Any news of Eva 1.0 appearing in New York City/Philly?             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Thu Mar 05, 2009 6:43 am I know that the main site would probably have a blurb if anything became official, but has anyone heard any vague rumblings, rumors, or perhaps rumors of rumors about Eva showings in this area? I'm about four hours from DC but that's a real haul just to watch a movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Thu Mar 05, 2009 10:39 am I would imagine that it would show at conventions or something ye olde animecons map: http://www.animecons.com/events/map.shtml , lists the following in that area: Castle Point Anime Con (March) I-CON (April) AnimeNEXT (June ) New York Anime Festival (Septembe) Zenkaicon (November) They're showing it in D.C., but I don't know if your in the area

[]: Re: Any news of Eva 1.0 appearing in New York City/Philly?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:30 pm SAWgunner wrote: I'm about four hours from DC but that's a real haul just to watch a movie.

[]: Re: Any news of Eva 1.0 appearing in New York City/Philly?             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Thu Mar 05, 2009 12:58 pm NAveryW wrote: SAWgunner wrote: I'm about four hours from DC but that's a real haul just to watch a movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Mar 05, 2009 1:57 pm dont forget Genericon at RPI in troy NY! I'm vice chair of the damn thing

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Mar 05, 2009 2:51 pm Anything new Pittsburgh?

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Thu Mar 05, 2009 8:21 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Anything new Pittsburgh?

[]: Re: Any news of Eva 1.0 appearing in New York City/Philly?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Mar 05, 2009 11:43 pm Twsa'teotu wrote: -he said "four hours"...that isn't "near" DC

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Fri Mar 06, 2009 12:44 am One of my fondest memories is of driving cross-country from California last year so no, long drives aren't a problem for me. But since I have a practical skills test for EMT that same day, it's pretty much a moot point. Although it would've been nice to go to a city I'm not familiar with and chill with some other Eva fans. Although most of my friends like anime most of them don't like Eva. Maybe if something happens in my area, we could all party up in NYC/Philly/Jersey.

[]:             Quote Post by Mackerni » Fri Mar 06, 2009 5:16 am I hope they have a screening in Milwaukee/Chicago ... come on! Give us Wisconsinites some love here.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Mar 06, 2009 4:20 pm Wait wait wait Tiffany Grant is not going!? I'm putting together a big Eva thing and she is not going to be there! ;________________________;

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Mar 06, 2009 4:27 pm If i can i'll try and get both 1.0 and 2.0 to get shown next year's Genericon in January. anyone near by should come :)

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Mar 06, 2009 5:51 pm Axell wrote: If i can i'll try and get both 1.0 and 2.0 to get shown next year's Genericon in January. anyone near by should come :)

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Mar 06, 2009 8:40 pm It will be sometime mid january. Its a nice decently sized college con. Pretty cheap too, 15 bucks for pre registered peeps. And if you come be sure to ask around for the vice chair :) (I'll probably be dressed as Gendo again........)
summary:
[]: Any news of Eva 1.0 appearing in New York City/Philly?             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Thu Mar 05, 2009 6:43 am I know that the main site would probably have a blurb if anything became official, but has anyone heard any vague rumblings, rumors, or perhaps rumors of rumors about Eva showings in this area? I'm about four hours from DC but that's a real haul just to watch a movie.

[]:        &nb
